name: Riskalyze (Nitrogen) Risk Alignment API
what_it_does: Riskalyze (rebranded as Nitrogen) risk tolerance and portfolio alignment REST API for financial advisor investment suitability and client risk profiling. Enables AI agents to manage client risk tolerance questionnaire and Risk Number scoring for suitability documentation, handle portfolio risk analysis and alignment scoring against client risk profile, access stress testing and portfolio scenario analysis for client risk communication, retrieve portfolio construction recommendations aligned to client Risk Number for automated investment proposals, manage household-level risk consolidation across multiple accounts for comprehensive risk alignment, handle compliance documentation of suitability assessment for regulatory audit trail, access model portfolio matching and proposal generation for investment recommendation automation, retrieve behavioral coaching insights for client communication automation, manage risk-based rebalancing triggers for portfolio drift monitoring, and integrate Riskalyze with portfolio management, CRM, and financial planning systems.
use_cases: Assessing client risk tolerance from suitability agents
Aligning portfolios to risk profiles from investment proposal agents
Stress-testing portfolios from risk analytics agents
not_for: Institutional asset managers without retail suitability focus
Individual investors without financial advisor intermediary
Non-financial services without investment risk context
best_when: An RIA or broker-dealer using Riskalyze/Nitrogen wanting AI agents to automate client risk profiling, portfolio alignment scoring, suitability documentation, stress testing, and investment proposal generation.
avoid_when: SEC/FINRA SUITABILITY AND REG BI COMPLIANCE: Automated risk assessment and investment recommendations using Risk Number scores must meet SEC Reg BI best interest or FINRA suitability requirements; automated portfolio recommendations without complete client profile (time horizon, liquidity needs, tax situation) create suitability violation. Overreliance on single metric — automated investment decisions based solely on Risk Number score without holistic financial planning creates incomplete suitability analysis; Risk Number is one input, not complete suitability determination. Behavioral risk tolerance vs capacity — automated risk tolerance measurement captures stated preference, not financial capacity to absorb loss; automated portfolio construction must also assess risk capacity (income, assets, liabilities); misalignment creates inappropriate portfolio risk. GIPS and performance advertising — automated Riskalyze stress test outputs shared with clients must comply with SEC advertising rules; automated marketing use of stress test results without required disclosures creates SEC marketing rule violation.

auth.notes: Riskalyze (Nitrogen) uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Auburn, California HQ. Founded 2011. Private (Broadhaven Capital Partners, Francisco Partners PE). Rebranded from Riskalyze to Nitrogen in 2023. 30,000+ financial advisors. Risk Number patent holder. $4T+ AUM assessed. Competes with Orion Risk Intelligence, Morningstar, and HiddenLevers for financial advisor risk analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-advisor monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-advisor monthly subscription; enterprise tier with API access
pricing.notes: Auburn, California. Francisco Partners PE. Founded 2011. Rebranded Nitrogen 2023. 30,000+ advisors. Risk Number patent. $4T+ AUM assessed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; portfolio analytics may be compute-intensive

known_agent_gotchas: REG BI SUITABILITY COMPLETENESS: Risk Number alone is insufficient for Reg BI best interest compliance; automated investment recommendations must incorporate complete client profile (time horizon, liquidity needs, tax situation, financial goals); automated proposals based only on Risk Number create incomplete suitability documentation

Risk tolerance vs risk capacity distinction — automated client profiling must assess both risk tolerance (psychological) and risk capacity (financial); automated portfolio construction that ignores risk capacity creates inappropriate portfolio risk for clients with low financial resilience
Rebrand API compatibility — Riskalyze rebranded to Nitrogen in 2023; verify current API endpoint domains and documentation reflect Nitrogen branding; legacy Riskalyze API references may be deprecated

Stress test disclosure requirements — automated sharing of Nitrogen stress test results with clients must comply with SEC marketing rule required disclosures (methodology, assumptions, limitations); automated marketing use without disclosures creates SEC marketing rule violation

Household consolidation complexity — automated risk scoring at household level must aggregate across custodians and account types; incomplete household view creates inaccurate aggregate risk assessment

Questionnaire delivery compliance — automated risk tolerance questionnaire delivery must ensure client completes it themselves, not advisor proxy completion; advisor-completed questionnaires create suitability documentation integrity risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Wealthtech risk analytics. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Client risk profile and portfolio data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Risk analytics. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Client risk and investment suitability data.
